title: Daily Source Pass
summary: Today's issue is built from WSMV, Visit Music City, Metro Council Legistar, Nashville.gov, Nashville Social, East Nasty, The Basement East, Nashville Public Library, and Google Places media. Facebook and Nextdoor remain queued for supervised screenshot capture.

stages.name: Public News Sweep
stages.goal: Find the same-day public items with clear local stakes.
stages.output: Published the Super Bowl celebration/East Bank follow-up and grocery-tax deferral explainer.

stages.name: Public Records And Budget Check
stages.goal: Use Metro records to backstop the numbers and timing.
stages.output: Confirmed the RS2026-1961 rate change, June 16 deferral, and FY2027 revenue note from public records and WSMV.

stages.name: Utility And Event Scan
stages.goal: Add the useful things people can act on today.
stages.output: Published a Wednesday night East Nashville mini-calendar with Game Point, East Nasty, The Basement East, and East Branch Library.

stages.name: Community Capture Lane
stages.goal: Pull Facebook and Nextdoor only when the editor can show screenshots or post notes.
stages.output: Held for supervised capture; no private-platform claims were promoted without visible receipts.

stages.name: Publish Pack
stages.goal: Ship stories with article sections, utility boxes, pull quotes, source trails, Google Places media, and maps.
stages.output: Four May 20 stories are published with real location images, inline media, source trails, and no source receipt card images.

publishQueue.why: It explains what was found, what was shipped, and what still needs supervised social capture.

publishQueue.decision: Published as an East Bank planning homework story.
publishQueue.why: The celebration is citywide, but the stadium/East Bank questions are directly relevant to East Nashville.

publishQueue.decision: Published as a plain-English grocery-tax explainer.
publishQueue.why: The deferral affects household costs and Metro budget tradeoffs.

publishQueue.decision: Published as a compact Wednesday night guide.
publishQueue.why: The items have clear time/place details and give readers something useful today.

publishQueue.decision: Held until screenshots or post notes are available.
publishQueue.why: The rule is interesting with receipts, not private-platform guesswork.

accessNeeds.name: Facebook group
accessNeeds.today: Open the East Nashville group in chronological/New posts mode when ready.
accessNeeds.guardrail: Publish individual stories only for posts with screenshots, clear public-interest value, and no kids, medical/financial details, private addresses, plates, or unverified accusations.

accessNeeds.name: Nextdoor
accessNeeds.guardrail: Treat as neighborhood signal until independently verified; redact sensitive personal details.

accessNeeds.name: Google Places photo desk
accessNeeds.today: Used for Lower Broadway, Nissan Stadium, Courthouse, Game Point, Basement East, and East Branch Library context.
accessNeeds.guardrail: Use exact or strong location photos with Google Maps/contributor attribution; no source receipt cards.
